name: Threads Post: Filipina caregivers and Asia's aging crisis
markdown_description:
## Hook
Three aging economies are building their elder-care systems on Filipino backs.

## Full Threads post (publish text)
Three aging economies are building their elder-care systems on Filipino backs.

Singapore deployed 195,346 Filipino workers in 2024. Japan: 49,825. Australia: 19,779.

A new PIDS study warns the Philippines itself is entering a care crisis. The country exporting caregivers cannot find enough to take care of its own parents.

Ganun kalala.

## Pillar
Pillar 5 (Filipino Empowerment) topics 5.12 + 5.14, with secondary anchor in Pillar 4 (Economic & Utility Reform) topic 4.9.

## Type
Hybrid (news anchor: PIDS study coverage May 26-29, 2026 + evergreen brain drain angle).
